zh.lifeSummary: 當Elena FitzHerbert於1245年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾諾波利時，她的父親Sir William FitzHerbert - Fifth Lord of Norbury25歲，母親Emeline de grendon37歲。她於1270年1月與Sir Walter Ridware of Hampstall Ridware結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1298年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elena FitzHerbert于1245年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾諾波利时，她的父亲Sir William FitzHerbert - Fifth Lord of Norbury25岁，母亲Emeline de grendon37岁。她于1270年1月与Sir Walter Ridware of Hampstall Ridware结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1298年之后。

nameMeanings.name: FitzHerbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Herbert (see Herbert ), ‘son of Herbert’.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Elena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Helen  , now used quite frequently in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Elena FitzHerbert was born in 1245, in Norbury, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William FitzHerbert - Fifth Lord of Norbury, was 25 and her mother, Emeline de grendon, was 37. She married Sir Walter Ridware of Hampstall Ridware in January 1270. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died after 1298.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elena FitzHerbert est née en 1245, à Norbury, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William FitzHerbert - Fifth Lord of Norbury, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Emeline de grendon, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Walter Ridware of Hampstall Ridware en janvier 1270. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée après 1298.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elena FitzHerbert 1245 in Norbury, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William FitzHerbert - Fifth Lord of Norbury 25 und ihre Mutter Emeline de grendon 37. Sie hat im Januar 1270 Sir Walter Ridware of Hampstall Ridware geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb nach 1298.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elena FitzHerbert è nata il nel 1245 nel Norbury, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir William FitzHerbert - Fifth Lord of Norbury, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Emeline de grendon, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Sir Walter Ridware of Hampstall Ridware nel gennaio 1270. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì dopo il 1298.

ja.lifeSummary: Elena FitzHerbertが1245年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアノーブリーで生まれた時，父Sir William FitzHerbert - Fifth Lord of Norburyは25歳，母Emeline de grendonは37歳であった。1270年1月にSir Walter Ridware of Hampstall Ridwareと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1298年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elena FitzHerbert(이)가 1245년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 노르버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William FitzHerbert - Fifth Lord of Norbury(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emeline de grendon(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1270년 1월 Sir Walter Ridware of Hampstall Ridware(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1298년 이후 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elena FitzHerbert родилась в 1245 г. в местности норбури, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William FitzHerbert - Fifth Lord of Norbury было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Emeline de grendon, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Walter Ridware of Hampstall Ridware январь 1270 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла после 1298 г.
